selected_problem_solved: With the routine patches inserted, the proof establishes the stated special case: for every finite loopless simple modular matroid \(M\) of rank at most \(3\) whose flat lattice admits an order-reversing involution, the poset of projective tropical linear spaces \(L(v)\subseteq \Trop(M)\) arising from valuated matroid quotients \(v\) of \(\mu_M\) admits an inclusion-reversing involution extending \(F\mapsto F^\perp\).
selector_skipped_reason: N_PARALLEL_RUNS=1 — single run, no selection needed

all_runs.label: A
all_runs.status: Track A finalize complete (full-proof polish, seed=nearly_verified_full_proof). See solution.tex and benchmark.json.
all_runs.problem_solved: With the routine patches inserted, the proof establishes the stated special case: for every finite loopless simple modular matroid \(M\) of rank at most \(3\) whose flat lattice admits an order-reversing involution, the poset of projective tropical linear spaces \(L(v)\subseteq \Trop(M)\) arising from valuated matroid quotients \(v\) of \(\mu_M\) admits an inclusion-reversing involution extending \(F\mapsto F^\perp\).
